overview: Parental Awareness Hub is a social awareness platform helping parents understand children's emotional well-being, mental health struggles, and healthy communication approaches. It features learning modules, AI-powered parenting guidance, community workshops, and a parent profile dashboard.
features: 6 interactive awareness learning modules on child emotional health
Floating AI chatbot for real-time parenting guidance
Parent profile dashboard with learning progress tracking
Mental health awareness and parent-child relationship guidance
